sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17838" key="au)tonuxi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-νῠχίς</orth> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτονῠχηδίς</orth>, <sense id="n17838.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αὐτονυχί</ref> </xr> I, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">163.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
